programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
Karma Farmer. Animated series. The Farmer transforms the farm into a chilled environment where work and chores are abolished and the animals are encouraged to express themselves.
Sinister Mouse. Animated series. Has Danger Mouse finally met his match? An evil version of the hero escapes from a parallel dimension and joins forces with Baron Greenback.
Magic Mess. The heroes quest to save the forest from a magical mess after Blossom decides she would rather be picnicking than recycling.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour

Whale Watching. Mr Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl.
Olive and Otto in Shmumberland, Part 1. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. When Olive and Otto get zapped into a comic book, Olive must use her knowledge of it to escape.
Cat v Dog. Walter's pampered cat Clawdia persuades her way into the gang, and only Gnasher can tell that she has a hidden agenda to oust him from Dennis's life forever.
Toilet Trouble. Danny and Mick want to try out the posh new leisure centre toilets.

programmes.show_name: Bitesize Daily: 10-11 Year Olds: Science: Light
programmes.show_description: Learn about shadows, how light travels and how we see things.
Episode 4. Dr Chris and Dr Xand learn about space. They find out all about the moon and how it affects our oceans and tides.
Living in Space. Dr Maggie explores living in space with star guest astronaut Jessica Meir, who spent 205 days on the ISS. Maggie's top five charts people living in space.
Spreading Bacteria. A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.   Followed by Shark Bites.
Awesome Oxygen. The doctors reveal why a body cannot survive without oxygen for more than three minutes, and they find out what it is like to be 999 call handlers.
The Force Force, Lever Man and the Goldilocks Zone. Meet superheroes the Force Force, and some of the 17th century's greatest minds star in Friends parody Colleagues.
You Walked Through Walls. Wouldn't it be cool to be able to walk through walls? From turning into a gas to quantum trickery, we discover why it wouldn't be quite as useful as you'd like.
Twisted Technology. The mobile phone! The vibrating poo platform! HH journeys through the history of tech.
Ingenious Inventors. A look at some of history's most ingenious inventors, as we take in everything from the invention of the wheel to the crisp.   Followed by Shark Bites.
Can't Stop Dancing. When Odd Sock Tyler needs to replace his missing dance crew, Andy and the band put their best feet forward, with some help from Cousin Mac's Super Sneakers.
Steel! Nitro and Sabre prank Steel with a huge spider costume at a fake Halloween photoshoot.
Bluefin Tuna. The Octonauts must find a way to help an injured tuna catch up with her school, before they speed out of reach.
The Hoverboard Race. During a hoverboard race, Dad's new super-powered hoverboard malfunctions, so Cosima and Big Lizard throw the race to rescue him!
The Fishy Treasure Hunt. The Piris join a treasure hunt competition, but is Captain Krill all that he appears?
New Broom. The witch casts a spell of squeaky voices on the heroes. It will be lifted once they have completed a quest to the Super Creepy Haunted Forest.
1,000th Quest. Hoofius's next quest will be his 1,000th, so he decides to wait for a really heroic one and insists that his friends quest without him.
Ninja v Ninja. The Ninjas realise that a spy has been following them to help a copycat.
A New Regime. Reality-style drama series. The Next Step holds auditions, welcoming prospective new dancers to the studio. The new studio head makes some surprising cuts.
The Riding Mistress. Bill is shocked when Thunder is put up for sale, and she desperately tries to keep him.

programmes.show_description: Monkeying Around. After the kids crash Mom and Dad's anniversary trip, they try to make amends by finding Gramps' long-lost wedding rings.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
